title: Innovative Yeasty Uruguayan Napa Cabbage Hash
description: A yeasty and velvety Uruguayan dish featuring napa cabbage, perfect for a brunch mood, and made with low-glycemic-friendly ingredients. This dish is steamed to perfection using the mushimono method.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded napa cabbage and dissolved yeast mixture, letting it sit for 10 minutes to allow the yeast to activate.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cabbage and yeast mixture to the skillet, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic.
Transfer the mixture to a steamer basket and steam using the mushimono method for 10 minutes, until the cabbage is tender.
In a small bowl, combine the crumbled uruguayan cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Sprinkle the cheese mixture over the steamed cabbage and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
